new_articles.title: Highflying hedge fund run by former OpenAI researcher will be cornerstone investor in SK Hynix U.S. listing
new_articles.summary: SK hynix 관련 기사다. 기사 제목은 'Highflying hedge fund run by former OpenAI researcher will be cornerstone investor in SK Hynix U.S. listing'이다. Three major investors in the technology sector will back SK Hynix’s offering of American depository receipts that is expected this week. 이 기사는 해당 기업과 연결된 해외 보도를 바탕으로 정리했다. 가능한 경우 본문에서 회사 언급 전후 문맥을 함께 반영했다.

new_articles.title: Two things Samsung might be considering: price hikes and a U.S. listing
new_articles.summary: Samsung Electronics 관련 기사다. 기사 제목은 'Two things Samsung might be considering: price hikes and a U.S. listing'이다. Samsung Electronics is reportedly proposing to raise the average selling price of its dynamic random access memory chips by 20%, another sign of the bottlenecks that are gripping the industry. 이 기사는 해당 기업과 연결된 해외 보도를 바탕으로 정리했다. 가능한 경우 본문에서 회사 언급 전후 문맥을 함께 반영했다.

new_articles.title: Chip giant SK Hynix to launch $36 billion US listing to ride global AI wave
new_articles.summary: SK hynix 관련 기사다. 기사 제목은 'Chip giant SK Hynix to launch $36 billion US listing to ride global AI wave'이다. Price range due to be revealed later on July 6. SK Hynix and Samsung Electronics will anchor the investment programme, the government said SK Hynix has been among the world’s largest beneficiaries of the AI boom as it outperformed its major rivals Samsung and Micron SK Hynix is a key supplier ​of high-bandwidth memory chips used in AI systems by customers such as Nvidia and Google SK Hynix is expected to join the chip-heavy Philadelphia SE Semiconductor index, analysts said, helping to pave the way for a surge in passive investments In June, HSBC said it would raise its valuation of SK Hynix by applying a 20 per cent premium to its previous price-to-book multiple of 2. 이 기사는 해당 기업과 연결된 해외 보도를 바탕으로 정리했다.

new_articles.title: South Korea's SK Hynix to launch $28 billion US listing to ride global AI wave
new_articles.summary: SK hynix 관련 기사다. 기사 제목은 'South Korea's SK Hynix to launch $28 billion US listing to ride global AI wave'이다. The company will sell 17. 79 million new shares in the depository receipt listing ‌on the ⁠Nasdaq, ⁠making it one of the world's most valuable tech firms. Listen to this article in summarized format South Korean chipmaker SK Hynix will on Monday launch ​its about $28 billion U Ten ADRs will represent ​one common share and the stock will be sold in a price range ​due to be revealed on Monday, based on SK Hynix's Seoul trading price SK Hynix's share price was trading 1% higher and ​the stock is up about 273% this ⁠year, as ‌it rides surging global investor demand for AI ​stocks SK Hynix has been ⁠among the world's largest beneficiaries of the AI boom ​as it outperformed its major rivals Samsung Electronics ​and Micron SK Hynix is a key supplier of high-bandwidth memory chips used in AI systems by customers such ​as Nvidia and Google. 이 기사는 해당 기업과 연결된 해외 보도를 바탕으로 정리했다.

new_articles.title: South Korea's SK Hynix launching $28 billion US listing to ride global AI wave
new_articles.summary: SK hynix 관련 기사다. 기사 제목은 'South Korea's SK Hynix launching $28 billion US listing to ride global AI wave'이다. Channel NewsAsia is an English-language news organization based in Singapore. July 6 : South Korean chipmaker SK Hynix will launch a U. S. listing on Monday to raise about $28 billion, according to regulatory filings, as it capitalises on the global artificial intelligence boom with one of the world's largest new share sales. The company will sell 17. 79 million new shares in the deposito.

S. listing on Monday to raise about $28 billion, according to regulatory filings, as it capitalises on the global artificial intelligence boom with one of the world's largest new share sales. The company will sell 17. 79 million new shares in the deposito.

matched_articles.title: SK Hynix mulls 0.5 percent fee payout in mega-offering
matched_articles.summary: SK hynix 관련 기사다. 기사 제목은 'SK Hynix mulls 0.5 percent fee payout in mega-offering'이다. Bringing Taiwan to the World and the World to Taiwan. In the SK Hynix offering, the job for bankers should be made easier by investor familiarity with a company that has long been listed in its home country and has been one of the hottest names among global technology stocks this year One of the sources of uncertainty is the volatility of SK Hynix shares listed in Seoul Even with a drop of 20 percent from last month’s peak, SK Hynix is still up 770 percent in 12 months Separately, the Bank of Korea (BOK) warned that single-stock leveraged exchange-traded funds (ETFs) tied to SK Hynix and Samsung Electronics Co could deepen market concentration, amplify volatility and intensify one-way trading flows, a local report said “With Samsung and SK Hynix accounting for more than half of stock market capitalization and trading volume, expanding investment in single-stock leveraged ETFs could further intensify this concentration,” the central bank said in a written response submitted to People Power Party lawmaker Park Sung-hoon, Yonhap News reported. 이 기사는 해당 기업과 연결된 해외 보도를 바탕으로 정리했다.
